name: Transmission
description: A fast, easy and free BitTorrent client
compose:
name: slashnode-transmission
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/transmission:4.1.2
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9091:9091
  widget-server:
    image: getumbrel/umbrel-transmission-widget-server:v1.0.0
    container_name: widget-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TRANSMISSION_URL: http://transmission_server_1
      TRANSMISSION_PORT: '9091'
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-transmission_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-transmission_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (transmission). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://transmissionbt.com/.
